reviews.author: Priti Waghela
reviews.comment:
I had a really lovely experience at Glam Salon and wanted to specially appreciate Arshad and Neha for their excellent service. I was quite stressed because my hair had developed a sticky, heavy buildup and I was worried about dryness, breakage and hair fall. My scalp and hair did not feel healthy, and I was genuinely concerned.
Arshad and Neha patiently understood my concern, assessed my hair condition and suggested a hair spa. The treatment was done very carefully and professionally, and the difference was visible immediately. My hair felt much cleaner, softer, lighter and smoother after the spa, and the stickiness that was bothering me was greatly reduced. My hair also looked fluffier and healthier afterward.
What I appreciated most was how gentle and attentive they were throughout the process. They did not rush, explained what they were doing, and made me feel reassured. It felt like they cared about improving the condition of my hair rather than just completing a service.💕
A big thank you to Arshad and Neha for bringing softness and life back to my hair. I’m very happy with the experience and would definitely recommend Glam Salon to anyone looking for good hair care and sincere service.❣️❣️

reviews.author: Komal Sangwan
reviews.comment: Absolutely loved my experience! The nail technician Wonchui was extremely professional, detail-oriented, and gentle throughout the appointment. My nails turned out beautifully shaped with a flawless finish, and the hygiene standards were excellent too. Highly recommend for anyone looking for stunning nails and great service! 💅✨

reviews.author: Shivani Kuddyady
reviews.comment: I had an amazing experience at The Glam Lab! My haircut was done by Arshad, who was extremely professional and really took the time to understand what would suit me best. He gave great suggestions and executed the style beautifully. I walked out feeling super happy with the result. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Nadra / Yusuf Shaikh
reviews.comment:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Absolutely loved my experience at The Glam Lab Salon in Bandra!
The staff was super friendly, professional, and made me feel completely at ease from the moment I walked in. The salon is clean, stylish, and has such a relaxing vibe. My stylist really listened to what I wanted and delivered results even better than I expected! The attention to detail and quality of products used were top-notch. I left feeling refreshed, pampered, and confident. Highly recommend The Glam Lab Salon to anyone looking for great service and a little self-care! 💇‍♀️✨

reviews.author: Rashmi Phadnis
reviews.comment:
I have been to Meenakshi last week for a makeup and she did a simply amazing job. I wanted a natural, very subtle look and she not only gave me that but even better. Her eye makeup was so perfect that my eyes popped up in all the photos. Not to mention the compliments I received. Thank you Meenakshi.
Meenakshi has been doing my hair for years now and I trust her completely with my hair colour and haircut.
She has always been very organised and professional in her work. Doing a makeup with her was icing on the cake.

reviews.author: Tsamara Aulia Yumna
reviews.comment:
I visited Lakmé Salon last week and I’m extremely satisfied with the entire experience! I had eyebrow threading, underarm waxing, a facial, and nail art, all done by two skilled, attentive, and friendly staff.

I really loved how my eyebrows turned out after the threading, they looked neat, well-shaped, and suited my face perfectly. The facial was clean, gentle, and didn’t hurt at all, leaving my skin fresh and glowing. The underarm waxing was also clean and carefully done, with great hygiene. And I absolutely loved my nail art, the design was pretty, detailed, and very neatly applied.

I also had a makeup consultation for my special day, my wedding, and my makeup artist, Meenakshi, was absolutely lovely. She was warm, talkative, and truly understood what suited my face and skin tone. She gave thoughtful recommendations and delivered a final look that was natural, elegant, and exactly what I had hoped for. She used MAC Cosmetics, so the product quality was also top-notch.

The salon is easy to find, strategic location, and they use well-known, trusted brands which made me feel even more confident in their services.

What impressed me most is that they were willing to open the salon at 6 AM just for us 🥺😍 a rare and meaningful gesture that showed their commitment to customer satisfaction.

Beyond the excellent makeup and services, I truly felt valued as a client. The team paid great attention to detail and made me feel comfortable and well cared for from beginning to end. The salon was clean, well-organized, and had a calming atmosphere, perfect for getting ready on such an important day.

Thank you so much, Lakmé Salon, especially Meenakshi, for your amazing service. I highly recommend this place to anyone looking for professional, reliable, and personalized beauty care for special occasion 👍😍🙏

reviews.author: Sahil Verma
reviews.comment:
I recently got nanoplastia treatment done at Lakme Salon, and unfortunately my experience has not been good.
Within just 2 days of the treatment, I noticed that the right side of my hair started becoming tangled and curly again, which is very disappointing. The whole purpose of nanoplastia is to make hair smooth, straight, and frizz-free for a longer period, but in my case, the results didn’t even last properly for a few days.
I followed the aftercare instructions carefully, so this issue does not seem to be from my side. It feels like either the treatment was not done properly or the product used was not effective.
Considering the cost of the service, I expected much better and long-lasting results. I would not recommend this treatment here based on my experience.
I hope the salon takes this feedback seriously and improves their service quality.

reviews.author: Priya s arora
reviews.comment:
The waxing service was really pathetic  it caused me a lot of pain. On top of that, there is never anyone available for services, and the appointments keep getting denied.
But my waxing experience was very disappointing. The waxing expert was not skilled, and the new staff member caused me a lot of pain. To make it worse, the expert was quite rude during the service. Overall, the waxing service really needs improvement.

Christina is the best for eyebrows.
Umesh does an amazing job with pedicures and manicures.
Meena’s work is always great.
I would also like to mention Meenakshi. She is truly a gem. She has been doing my services for the past 15 years, and her work has always been excellent.

reviews.comment:

I highly recommend lakme for hair cut and blow dry.

⭐☆☆☆☆
Terrible experience at 7 Wonders Studio.

reviews.author: AMRITA PAI
reviews.comment:
Been a regular customer of this salon for over 3 years now where I have renewed packages for some services as well a few times!

My package for a particular service had just expired (by about 2 months) while I had one more service still pending in that package (which was fully paid) !

Since it had expired (by two months), she said I couldn’t avail my last service (which was paid for) and asked me to pay. She said if I renewed it again, then she could give me.

While I’ve defi renewed but her attitude towards footing the bill seemed more impt than ensuring I was taken care of! I had paid for that service , she could’ve easily said that she would defi include the current service! She wanted to ask the management!

I would’ve most defi renewed it again but got reallly ticked off by TERRIBLE customer service by a lady called Himani.

So while I’ve paid, but will gladly take my business to a more customer centric salon!! Never again # #FAIL #JCB #Management

reviews.author: Shakeel
reviews.comment:
I recently visited Jean-Claude Biguine Salon & Spa in Pali Hill, Bandra for a complete hair-color service and spent approximately ₹25,000. While the salon has a lovely ambience and the team was courteous and welcoming, I was a bit disappointed with the final outcome of the hair color.

Despite a detailed consultation, the shade did not turn out quite as expected, and the tones looked uneven in natural light. Given the premium pricing and the salon’s strong reputation, I had hoped for a more refined and precise result.

I truly appreciate the staff’s professionalism and the overall experience at the salon, but I do feel the hair-color service could have been executed with more attention to detail. I hope this feedback is helpful, as I believe the salon has great potential and can deliver results that fully match the expectations set by its brand.

reviews.author: pavitra patel
reviews.comment: I recently got a hair touch-up done by Habib and had a great experience! He took the time to explain my hair quality and provided in-depth advice on the products and care routine I should follow. I highly recommend Habib as your next hairdresser – he's knowledgeable, professional, and truly cares about his clients hair health.

Leaving this review so no tourists is ripped off again.

reviews.comment:
I recently visited this salon and I must say, it was an absolutely wonderful experience! From the moment I walked in, the staff made me feel so comfortable and welcomed. Everyone is very polite, friendly, and professional.

The service was top-notch — they really listen to what you want and give the best suggestions according to your hair/skin type. The quality of work is excellent, and they pay attention to every small detail. I was completely satisfied with the results, it turned out even better than I expected! 😍

The salon is very clean, well-maintained, and has such a relaxing vibe. You can truly feel the positive energy there. I also loved the products they use — very good quality and safe for sensitive skin.

Thank you so much to the entire team for such an amazing service. I will definitely visit again and recommend this place to all my friends and family. Keep up the great work! 🌟✨
Thnk you soo much   Faizal  🙌😌

reviews.author: payal choksi
reviews.comment: Had a great experience at the LOOKGOOD salon! The staff was very polite and professional. Special thanks to Monish for giving me exactly the haircut I wanted based on my reference picture, and to Saroj for the relaxing and well-done pedicure. Very satisfied with the service. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Epil Murmu
reviews.comment:
I had an excellent experience at Look Good Salon. From the moment I walked in, the staff was warm, welcoming, and made me feel comfortable. My stylist, Rihan sir, truly listened to what I wanted and delivered exactly that. He was not only incredibly professional but also very friendly, which made the whole experience even better.

What honestly shocked me—in the best way—was the pricing. I was charged ₹2050 for a haircut, hairstyling, eyebrow shaping, and a hair spa. I mean, who does that? The last time I went to a salon in Andheri, I paid ₹1800 just for a haircut. Getting all these services at Look Good Salon for such a reasonable price was unbelievable.

On top of that, Rihan sir gave me an amazing neck and head massage, which was so relaxing. And as if that wasn’t enough, they even offered me tea. I have never experienced this level of customer service at a salon before. I truly felt pampered and cared for.

The lady who did my eyebrows also did a fantastic job—very neat and precise. Honestly, every single staff member was polite, welcoming, and professional. The overall environment of the salon is friendly, positive, and comforting.

I walked into the salon feeling nervous and scared because I’ve never had a great salon experience in the past. But I walked out feeling happy, confident, and completely satisfied. If I had to rate my experience on a scale of 1 to 10, I would give it 10/10—a truly wonderful experience.

I absolutely love my new look and couldn’t be happier with the results. I’m definitely looking forward to my next visit to Look Good Salon, and without a doubt, Rihan sir will be my stylist again.

Highly recommended! ✨💇‍♀️

reviews.author: Ginny
reviews.comment:
Very disappointing experience at Envi Salon, Juhu, especially considering the prices they charge and the “luxury” image they project.

The washroom hygiene was extremely poor ,there was a strong unpleasant smell, which is honestly unacceptable for a premium salon.

The therapists constantly seemed to be in a rush. A manicure and pedicure are supposed to feel relaxing, but everything felt hurried and careless. My sister repeatedly requested the therapist during her foot massage to be gentler because it was becoming painful, but there was barely any sensitivity towards client comfort.

During my manicure, the therapist herself had long coffin nails, which kept poking into my skin while massaging my hands. It felt uncomfortable, unhygienic, and extremely unprofessional.

To make matters worse, there was constant disturbance from a child screaming, running around the salon, and loudly watching reels throughout the service. It completely ruined the atmosphere.
High prices alone do not create a luxury experience ,professionalism, hygiene, attentiveness, and respect for client comfort do.Why are the therapists always in a rush, pls give appointments according to the therapists schedule then instead of the client’s ..

Honestly, we feel stuck because we’ve already taken a membership, but the service quality has been consistently underwhelming for the amount being charged.

reviews.comment:

Her hair colouring is especially outstanding — I receive so many compliments every time, and it always looks natural, fresh, and beautifully done.
Her staff are just as impressive: professional, friendly, and attentive from start to finish.

reviews.author: vishakha fulsunge
reviews.comment:
Very disappointing experience at Lakmé Salon (Colaba branch).  Today I got a gel nail polish done here for ₹700, and it was a complete waste of money. The technician didn’t clean my nails properly before applying the polish and painted right up to the cuticles—something any professional should avoid.

Worse, she tried to cheat by applying a base coat instead of a top coat, and when I questioned it, she lied to my face and hid the bottle label. I double-checked and confirmed it was indeed a base coat. The audacity to lie is unacceptable.

My nails are completely ruined now. They also have very limited colour options and poor technique. I would never recommend this branch, at least not for nail services. Extremely unprofessional and dishonest. Avoid!

reviews.comment:

I left half way through.
They did absolutely lousy job. The cuticles were not removed.
There was no base coat.
When the girls started applying the nail polish one could see still the cuticles.
The nail polish was thick.
The feet were not scrubbed properly.
As one can see from the photos.

Didn’t realise Lakme standard had fallen so much.
Would visit Lakme churchgate 30 years ago when I lived in India.

The place lacked hygiene
The chair was run down.
The staff was walking about aimlessly around.

reviews.author: Jin Ju Kim
reviews.comment:
When I came to India, my friend told me I should try hair oil treatment and a head massage. Around tourist areas, though, I noticed many spas and salons tend to overcharge and aren’t very transparent with pricing. Then we found this salon — it offers a wide range of services from facials and massages to hair treatments. It’s not a fancy, cozy spa, more of a busy local salon full of regular customers, but I was really touched by the warmth and professionalism of the ladies there, so I wanted to leave a review.

I had coconut oil applied to my scalp along with a scalp massage, and it was incredibly relaxing — honestly one of the best scalp massages I’ve ever had. At the same time, I also got a foot massage going all the way up to my thighs. The therapist, Lata, really knew exactly where to focus. My legs feel so much lighter now, and she was very sweet, constantly checking if I was comfortable. Even with the language barrier, I could tell she genuinely cared and did her absolute best. I’m actually going to miss her — hands down the best foot massage I’ve ever received.

I also tried a hair booster treatment, and my hair finally feels calmer and much less frizzy.

This place may not have the most luxurious seating or spa atmosphere, but the people working here truly make the experience special. Their kindness, effort, and professionalism made it such a memorable visit.

The music in the salon is clean, cool and lovely and they use high-quality products.  They offered us tea and coffee., They even switched off the light when I was having my hair washed. This was the most comfortable Hair washing seats I have ever sat in. I’m quite sure I fell asleep… And went to heaven! Thank you, Sarita … I will definitely be back and bring more friends.

reviews.author: Priyanka Rahate
reviews.comment:
I am extremely disappointed to be writing this, especially because I had previously shared a very positive review for this salon and have been a regular customer for a long time. In fact, my last visit—when I got my nail extensions done—was a very good experience.
However, my experience yesterday at the Worli branch was extremely upsetting.
I had booked a body massage, but the service was far from satisfactory. Even if the massage was offered at a discounted rate, it was the salon’s decision to run a promotion. As a customer, I still expect a basic standard of service. I have taken massages at your salon earlier at the regular price, and the quality then was much better.
This massage felt more like simple oil application rather than a proper therapeutic massage. The therapist did not seem aware of pressure points or massage techniques. Salons should not take the risk of merely completing an appointment without ensuring trained staff.
Additionally, the ongoing some renovation made it impossible to relax. I came directly from office specifically to unwind, but constant noise and a creaking massage table completely ruined the experience. If renovation work is in progress, appointments for relaxation services should ideally not be taken.
The main purpose of my visit was relaxation, as I was already experiencing body soreness. Instead of feeling relieved, I left feeling more irritated and uncomfortable.
This experience was very disappointing, especially considering my earlier loyalty to your salon.

reviews.author: Spandan Maskar
reviews.comment:
Absolutely disappointing experience and borderline misleading pricing.

I called the salon beforehand and clearly asked for the price of a men’s haircut. I was told it would be Rs 400. Based on that, I went ahead and got my haircut done. Once everything was finished, I was suddenly told my total bill was Rs 630 because I had received a “stylish” haircut.

Naturally, I asked what exactly counts as a normal haircut. The barber’s answer was vague and unhelpful. He just kept repeating “sir, normal haircut,” without explaining anything. When I pushed further, he said my mullet haircut is considered stylish, while a “normal” haircut is just normal. That explanation makes no sense. My hairstyle is not unusual, and I’ve been to many salons before. This is the first time I’ve been charged extra after the service without being informed upfront.

It gets worse. During the haircut, I asked how much a beard trim would cost. The barber casually said Rs 450. I questioned this immediately because I had just been told the haircut itself was Rs 400. How does a beard cost more than the haircut? His response was that Lakme provides them with a rate card and they have to follow it. That didn’t inspire any confidence, so I opted out of the beard service.

What this really shows is a lack of transparency and poor communication. Prices seem to change based on labels like “stylish” rather than being clearly explained before the service begins. The staff didn’t seem confident in explaining their own pricing and appeared more focused on upselling everything possible instead of being upfront and finishing what they started properly.

My advice to anyone considering this place: ask very specific questions, get every price confirmed clearly, and don’t assume the quoted rate will actually be what you pay at the end. Otherwise, be prepared for surprises at the billing counter.

reviews.author: Sanika Shetye
reviews.comment:
February 15, 2026

I chose this Lakme salon expecting a certain standard given the brand name. Unfortunately the experience was disappointing. This is not my usual salon but due to last minute availability elsewhere, I ended up here.

The salon is located on Ranade road, just a 5-minute walk from Dadar west metro station.

The salon seemed to be operating purely on the reputable branding.  At 11 am, the place was dimly lit, almost empty and staffed by only three people, including the receptionist.

I had requested a hair wash with blast dry along with a nail cut and filing. The person who started with my nails seemed inexperienced. She cut them so short that shaping them became impossible. They were left flat and uneven. Midway she was redirected to another walk-in customer and Rama took over.

Rama’s services were below expectations. While my hair was oily and needed a thorough wash, her technique felt more like scrubbing a kitchen slab than a scalp. Nail cutting and filing that she completed afterward was equally substandard.

Adding to the discomfort, the air conditioning was cooling properly, the lighting was inadequate, and the overall service quality was disappointing.

Overall it was a poor experience. I would not recommend this salon.

reviews.comment: The experience was average. The service itself was okay, but the staff tend to push customers toward more expensive options. reviews.author: Tejal Palkar
reviews.comment:
Guys, please keep this in mind before visiting ESTIQUE Salon. Make sure you clearly ask the receptionist whether your service will be done by a trainee or an experienced staff member.
On my second visit, I went with a positive mindset based on my previous good experience. However, this time they assigned a trainee for my facial without informing me. She only applied products on my face and did not perform proper facial techniques.
During one step, I realized she might be a trainee, so I asked her directly — and she confirmed that she was. I immediately requested another experienced staff member, but they denied my request. They didn’t even give me the option to stop the service. Instead, they told me I had no choice and must continue with the trainee. They assured me that the trainee had 2 years of experience, but the service quality did not reflect that at all.
Very disappointing experience. There was no transparency and no respect for customer choice. I would not recommend this salon unless you clearly confirm who will be providing your service.

reviews.comment:
So I have been visiting lakme since last 20 years. Initially lakme as a salon had a warm affectionate feel with their lady therapists then as it was a woman centric place. And the price point was affordable. But my this time experience , must confess was going to this place after almost 8 months was rather astonishing. The place was empty since it was morning time so no customers
Despite that services were taking so long and it was the sheer lack of commitment which one could make out from the body language of the therapists, their careless attitude, poor hospitality to mention a few.  Although service was very average their pricing is way beyond. This is not the place it used to be. High time more energy and vibrancy is pumped in.

reviews.comment:

The lady, Pallavi I believe, seemed competent enough without the training and efficiency expected of a Lakme employee.
The prices are Lakme standard and that's where it ends.
I had planned a manicure, eyebrows and waxing but left after the waxing because really, the rest are specialty and cannot be risked.

Overall, not going back.
If the owner and Lakme gets this note- please remember you are a brand with some standards and not just a business.

reviews.comment:
The three stars are not for the haircut — Vijay did a great job!

The rating is for the lack of time management and, more importantly, the lack of acknowledgment of the same by the salon manager.

I went in at 4:30 pm for a haircut and to decide between hair colour or an anti-frizz treatment based on their recommendation. Had already discussed it over phone at the time of booking the appt. I was actually open to doing any along with haircut, depending on their advice, and was quite excited after reading the great reviews. This was also my first visit!

However, until 6:15 pm, no actual service had started apart from colour tests to check how my hair would react to the colour on 3 three strands.

At 6:15 pm, a third person, apparently their senior-most stylist came over and repeated the same things the stylist had mentioned earlier. I had to remind them the time of my arrival and the hope to leave by 7:30 or 8 pm. Despite that, everything happened slow.

In the end, I had to ask them to just cut my hair without even a wash. The haircut itself took about 40–45 minutes as it was barely 2-3 inches of hair cut, and I finally left at 7:20 pm feeling utterly disappointed.

Unfortunately, the manager showed no remorse or accountability, and instead spoke as though such delays were obvious and expected for anyone visiting a salon for hair colour as though this was my first time colouring the hair. I had experienced patch tests earlier but never for more than 90 minutes or more.

This was honestly not an experience I had expected, especially after the reviews. The unfortunate part is, its difficult to find such time to do such treatments and had almost waited for a month to book this appt.

Big mistake I did

🚫 Overpriced & unprofessional service. I asked for a 2-3 inch cut, but they hacked off my waist-length hair to shoulder length! Claimed damage & cut without consent. Untrained staff. ₹1,200 to ruin hair when others charge ₹400 for good service? Choose wisely.

Lesson of 2026: Don't fall for the brand, go local! 🙅‍♀️" How terrifying it is you can see in last picture the final look after the great service from namastey salon how professional they are into the brand 😊

i had high expectations from Namastay Salon Kharghar given their reputation. Since it's been less than a week, im getting call from them as they are willing to fix the issue or offer some compensation BUT DO YOU REALLY THINK IT WILL WORK.

I can draft a complaint for consumer court.
As being a big brand if you guys have your terms and conditions then as a consumer I can also take this into higher consideration.

reviews.author: manisha ghorai
reviews.comment:
Worst… Firstly, they issued a low discounted offer, but when we visited the salon, it was automatically converted to the original price, which appears to be a misleading marketing strategy.

We proceeded with Nanoplastia, which damaged the hair severely—the effect completely wore off within a week, causing further harm.

When we raised the issue, they repeatedly insisted that we visit the salon again for inspection. However, due to the loss of trust and the risk of further damage, we chose not to revisit.

⭐ 5/5 – Absolutely Loved My Hair Transformation at Makme Salon Nerul! ⭐
